dict.string: CommandNest needs Desktop access only when you ask the local agent to inspect or organize files there.
CommandNest needs Documents access only when you ask the local agent to inspect, create, edit, or organize files there.
CommandNest needs Downloads access only when you ask the local agent to inspect or organize downloaded files.
CommandNest needs network volume access only when you ask the local agent to work with files on mounted network drives.
CommandNest needs removable volume access only when you ask the local agent to work with files on external drives.
